title: selaginella wariensis
intro: Selaginella wariensis is a species of spore-producing plant in the family Selaginellaceae, commonly known as spike moss or resurrection fern due to its ability to revive itself after drying out. This plant has been traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Selaginella wariensis include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. The plant is typically prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and can also be used as a topical treatment for skin conditions and wounds.
